'''Sarma''' was a [[Dubravan]] [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] on [[Dubrava/Legends|Dubrava]] following the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]].

==Biography==
The [[Nevana's father|father]] of [[Nevana]] owed a debt to Sarma, but Nevana paid it off with information leading to the location of [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]]. Sarma betrayed Nevana, and led [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtroopers]] to her to find her source—[[Jal Te Gniev]]. Sarma, too, was betrayed—[[Death/Legends|murdered]] by the stormtroopers he had sold the information to.

==Appearances==
*[[Vader's Quest 2|''Vader's Quest'' 2]] {{1st}}
